name: floatdoro
description: A floating Pomodoro timer with pie-chart progress in the title bar.

scripts.build: tsc -noEmit -skipLibCheck && node esbuild.config.mjs production && xcopy manifest.json E:\ObsidianVaultBak\.obsidian\plugins\floatdoro /Y && xcopy styles.css E:\ObsidianVaultBak\.obsidian\plugins\floatdoro /Y
scripts.version: node version-bump.mjs && git add manifest.json versions.json

author: BestJavaCN
